messages.content: As an AI language model, I cannot understand the specific problem you are referring to. Can you please provide more context and clarify your question?
huh?

I thought you know it better.

I explained it in great details ^above, what do you want else?

no, it's not centered perfectly rotation XYZ axis right at the center of 3d cube...
no, man. I'm alergic to any third-parties, only innocent javascript.
oh so many errors, man...
